code: import React,{useMemo}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{useInView}from'../../hooks/useInView';import{getAllServices}from'../../data/servicePages';import'./ServicesOverview.css';/** Matches typical desktop row of 4 cards; remainder row is centered */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const SERVICES_ROW_COLUMNS=4;const ServicesOverview=()=>{const[ref,visible]=useInView();const services=getAllServices();const{main,remainder}=useMemo(()=>{const n=services.length;const r=n%SERVICES_ROW_COLUMNS;if(r===0){return{main:services,remainder:[]};}const splitAt=n-r;return{main:services.slice(0,splitAt),remainder:services.slice(splitAt)};},[services]);const renderCard=(s,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:`/services/${s.slug}`,className:`service-link-card reveal-item services-link-card-${index}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"service-link-icon","aria-hidden":true,children:s.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:s.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:s.heroDescription}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"service-link-more",children:"View service"})]},s.slug);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"services-overview services-overview--compact",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{ref:ref,className:`services-overview-inner reveal-group ${visible?'is-visible':''}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"section-title reveal-item",children:"Services overview"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"services-overview-intro reveal-item",children:"Explore each service in detail on its own page, or send us your query and we will recommend the right support."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"services-link-grid",children:main.map((s,i)=>renderCard(s,i))}),remainder.length>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"services-link-grid services-link-grid--remainder",children:remainder.map((s,i)=>renderCard(s,main.length+i))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"cta-center reveal-item",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/contact",className:"btn-primary btn-large",children:"Submit Your Query"})})]})})});};export default ServicesOverview;
